name: Crab & Avocado Fritters
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Avocado, peeled and cut into 1/4-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
2. In a large bowl, combine crabmeat, diced green onions, and avocado.
3. In a separate bowl, mix eggs, hot chili salsa, and salt.
4. Add the egg mixture to the crab mixture and stir in breadcrumbs.
5. Form the mixture into 1 1/2-inch balls.
6. Place the fritters on the prepared baking sheet.
7. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 3 hours (or prepare up to one day ahead and freeze; do not thaw before cooking).
8. Preheat the oven to its lowest setting.
9. Line another baking sheet with paper towels.
10. Heat oil in a large skillet to a depth of 3 inches, reaching 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
11. Dust the fritters with flour.
12. Cook the fritters in batches (avoid overcrowding) for about 2 minutes per side for refrigerated fritters or about 3 minutes per side for frozen fritters.
13. Drain on paper towels and transfer to the prepared sheet.
14. Keep warm in the oven until all are cooked.
15. Garnish with green onion slivers and serve immediately.
